name: Boltzmann MapReduce: A Partition-Function Reduce for Forkable Sandboxes
summary: arXiv:2607.09689v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: To leading order under local asymptotic normality (LAN), the confidence density a worker emits over a chunk of size $n$ is a Gibbs--Boltzmann measure...
description: arXiv:2607.09689v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: To leading order under local asymptotic normality (LAN), the confidence density a worker emits over a chunk of size $n$ is a Gibbs--Boltzmann measure $\exp\{-\beta E(\theta)\}$ whose inverse temperature is the sample size, $\beta=n$. Three consequences are exact in the Gaussian/linear case and first-order otherwise: disjoint chunks carry independe...
author: Yossi Eliaz
